global.description: Helm-injected global values (present when installed as a dependency).

resources.description: Compute resource requests and limits for the manager container. See https://pkg.go.dev/k8s.io/api/core/v1#ResourceRequirements

resizePolicy.description: Container resizePolicy for in-place resource resizes (InPlacePodVerticalScaling). See https://pkg.go.dev/k8s.io/api/core/v1#ContainerResizePolicy

logLevel.description: Operator log verbosity (--zap-log-level): empty = default (info). One of "info", "debug", "error", "panic", or an integer level (1 = debug/V1, 2 = V2 trace).

livenessProbe.description: Liveness probe for the manager container. See https://pkg.go.dev/k8s.io/api/core/v1#Probe

readinessProbe.description: Readiness probe for the manager container. See https://pkg.go.dev/k8s.io/api/core/v1#Probe

podSecurityContext.description: Pod-level security context for the manager pod. See https://pkg.go.dev/k8s.io/api/core/v1#PodSecurityContext

securityContext.description: Container-level security context for the manager container. See https://pkg.go.dev/k8s.io/api/core/v1#SecurityContext

nodeSelector.description: Node label selector for the manager pod.

tolerations.description: Tolerations for the manager pod. See https://pkg.go.dev/k8s.io/api/core/v1#Toleration

affinity.description: Affinity rules for the manager pod. See https://pkg.go.dev/k8s.io/api/core/v1#Affinity

topologySpreadConstraints.description: Topology spread constraints for the manager pod. See https://pkg.go.dev/k8s.io/api/core/v1#TopologySpreadConstraint

extraManifests.description: Additional Kubernetes manifests rendered with the chart. Entries are YAML objects or strings; both are passed through tpl.
